chown www-data:rule2     wikiwiki/run.cgi
chmod rwxrwx---          wikiwiki/run.cgi
chown www-data:rule1     wikiwiki/secret.cgi
chmod r--------          wikiwiki/secret.cgi
chown www-data:rule2     wikiwiki/other.cgi
chmod rwxrwx---          wikiwiki/other.cgi
chown www-data:rule3     main.py
chmod rw-r--r--          main.py
chown nobody:rule5       README.md
chmod rw-r--r--          README.md
chown nobody:rule5       home/a.txt
chmod rw-r--r--          home/a.txt
chown nobody:rule5       home/b.txt
chmod rw-r--r--          home/b.txt
chown www-data:rule3     home/c.py
chmod rw-r--r--          home/c.py
chown nobody:rule5       .git/inside_git1.txt
chmod rw-r--r--          .git/inside_git1.txt
chown nobody:rule4       xy/.git/inside_git2.txt
chown nobody:rule4       xy/.git/rs/inside_git3.txt
